name: Sorrow
description: Limp in damaged, broke, and out of options. The frontier's economics meet you at the airlock; the frontier's politics meet you at the bar. Beats 3-4 of the Duskway Run demo.

stages.objective: Dock at Sorrow Station — fly to the station and press R in range
Trouble at the bar — Prudence is in it

epilogue.failure: The Loup-Garou dies within scope range of a dock she couldn't reach. Sorrow Station logs the debris field and pours one out at the Interval, which is the whole of the frontier's funeral rite.
